title: Irkutsk, Irkutsk Oblast — Cost of Living, Housing & Relocation Guide [2026]
description: Complete guide to Irkutsk, Irkutsk Oblast: cost of living, home prices, neighborhoods, remote work readiness, and relocation tips.
content:
Overview

Irkutsk is a city in Irkutsk Oblast with a population of 620,000. The cultural capital of Eastern Siberia, a historic city near Lake Baikal with beautiful wooden architecture and a vibrant Decembrist heritage.

Last updated: July 21, 2026
